description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind CodeQL that runs CodeQL analysis on push and pull requests to the development branch, specifically when changes are made to cmake, amr-wind, unit_tests, CMakeLists.txt, or .github/workflows/codeql.yml. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository with submodules, installs dependencies, and then initializes, configures, builds, and analyzes the C++ code with CodeQL.
